title.en: Beccacece goes from brink to World Cup history with Ecuador
title.zh-CN: 与厄瓜多尔一起探索贝卡塞斯的世界杯历史

summary.en: Sebastian Beccacece was on the verge of losing his job as Ecuador head coach as the clock ticked down against Germany - now he has a last-32 match to look forward to.
summary.zh-CN: 塞巴斯蒂安·贝卡塞斯（ Sebastian Beccacece ）在对阵德国的比赛中即将失去厄瓜多尔主教练的职位-现在他有最后一场32场比赛值得期待。

title.en: 'We could call it racist' - Ivory Coast boss sad at Schweinsteiger comments
title.zh-CN: “我们可以称之为种族主义” -科特迪瓦老板在Schweinsteiger的评论中伤心

summary.en: Ivory Coast boss Emerse Fae says comments from ex-Germany midfielder Bastian Schweinsteiger about their "wild" playing style could be considered racist.
summary.zh-CN: 科特迪瓦老板Emerse Fae表示，前德国中场球员Bastian Schweinsteiger关于他们“狂野”比赛风格的评论可能被认为是种族主义者。

title.en: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures under way the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛的举行，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: What Scotland need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰需要什么才能达到世界杯淘汰赛

summary.en: After their 3-0 defeat by Brazil, BBC Sport looks at what Scotland require to reach the knockout phase.
summary.zh-CN: 在3-0击败巴西之后，英国广播公司体育台着眼于苏格兰达到淘汰赛阶段所需的条件。

title.en: 'Oh my word!' - Elanga 'stunner' draws Sweden level
title.zh-CN: “哦，我的天！” - Elanga的“stunner”吸引了瑞典的水平

summary.en: Anthony Elanga scores a brilliant curling effort from the edge of the area to draw Sweden level with Japan in their FIFA World Cup Group F match at Dallas Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）在达拉斯体育场（ Dallas Stadium ）举行的国际足联世界杯F组比赛中，从该地区的边缘进行了精彩的冰壶比赛，将瑞典与日本拉平。

title.en: Japan and Sweden draw takes both into last 32
title.zh-CN: 日本和瑞典平局都进入了最后32名

summary.en: Daizen Maeda's smart finish to Japan's team goal is cancelled out by Anthony Elanga's long-range strike as Sweden fight back in a 1-1 draw that takes both sides through to the World Cup knockout...
summary.zh-CN: 前田大全（ Daizen Maeda ）对日本队进球的聪明成绩被安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）的长程罢工所抵消，因为瑞典以1-1平局反击，将双方带入世界杯淘汰赛......

title.en: Elanga earns Sweden spot in World Cup knockouts with Japan draw
title.zh-CN: Elanga凭借日本平局在世界杯淘汰赛中赢得瑞典席位

summary.en: Anthony Elanga's stunning equaliser booked Sweden's spot in the World Cup knockout stages after a 1-1 draw with Japan, who also go through as the second-placed team in Group F.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）令人惊叹的均衡器在与日本队1-1平局后，在世界杯淘汰赛阶段获得了瑞典队的位置，日本队也是F组中排名第二的球队。

title.en: Netherlands claim Group F top spot with win over Tunisia
title.zh-CN: 荷兰以击败突尼斯夺得F组榜首

summary.en: Netherlands secured top spot in Group F with a comprehensive 3-1 win over Tunisia.
summary.zh-CN: 荷兰以3比1全面战胜突尼斯，夺得F组冠军。

title.zh-CN: 土耳其v美国： 2026年世界杯–直播

title.en: Netherlands power to win over Tunisia and set up last-32 meeting with Morocco
title.zh-CN: 荷兰大国赢得突尼斯并与摩洛哥建立最后32次会议

summary.en: The Oranje bus had better get a move on. A comfortable victory over Tunisia after being sent on their way by a record-equalling 12th own goal of the tournament and further strikes from Brian Brobbey...
summary.zh-CN: Oranje公交车最好快点。在被比赛的第12个进球和Brian Brobbey的进一步罢工送到突尼斯之后，这是一场轻松的胜利......

title.en: Japan and Sweden both reach World Cup last 32 after Elanga’s strike seals draw
title.zh-CN: 日本和瑞典在Elanga的罢工印章抽签后都进入了世界杯的最后32场比赛

summary.en: It was a result that served everybody but, even though the mutual convenience of a draw became evident rapidly, at least this game conjured up two moments to cherish. Japan guaranteed the runners-up...
summary.zh-CN: 这是一个为所有人服务的结果，但即使抽签的相互方便很快变得明显，至少这场比赛让人想起了两个值得珍惜的时刻。日本保证亚军……

title.en: Ecuador fight back to upset Germany
title.zh-CN: 厄瓜多尔反击惹恼德国

summary.en: Goals from Nilson Angulo and Gonzalo Plata help Ecuador come from behind to beat Germany 2-1 to qualify for the knockout stages of the World Cup, as one of the top eight third-placed teams.
summary.zh-CN: 尼尔森·安古洛（ Nilson Angulo ）和贡萨洛·普拉塔（ Gonzalo Plata ）的进球帮助厄瓜多尔以2比1击败德国队，成为世界杯淘汰赛阶段的前八名第三名球队之一。

title.en: James doubtful for Panama but England hopeful on Rice
title.zh-CN: 詹姆斯对巴拿马持怀疑态度，但英格兰对大米抱有希望

summary.en: England's Reece James and Declan Rice miss England's penultimate training session before Panama with injury concerns.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队的里斯·詹姆斯（ Reece James ）和德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）因伤病问题在巴拿马之前错过了英格

title.en: Why it's time for Saka and Rashford - Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why Thomas Tuchel needs to change some personnel as well as his team's mindset when they face Panama.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）需要更换一些人员，以及他的团队面对巴拿马时的心态。

summary.en: All the TV and radio details for each of the 2026 World Cup group games.

title.en: Is the World Cup ball making it hard for goalkeepers?

summary.en: While some goalkeepers have produced heroic performances in the World Cup, others have struggled with shots from outside the area, so is there a problem with the ball?

title.en: How brands banned from the World Cup became the story

summary.en: When we try to suppress something, we often make it more visible - and Fifa is living that in real time with its sponsors.

title.en: World Cup makes more than enough money - New York mayor Mamdani

summary.en: Mayor of New York Zohran Mamdani says the World Cup generates "more than enough" income and supporters should not have to pay higher prices.

title.en: Scotland on the brink after defeat by Brazil

summary.en: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup for the first time are in significant peril with calamitous defending allowed Brazil to win 3-0 in Miami and finish top of Group C.

title.en: Morocco progress after victory over Haiti

summary.en: Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine score late goals for Morocco to deny Haiti their first-ever World Cup point in Atlanta.

title.en: South Africa into round of 32 after win over South Korea

summary.en: Thapelo Maseko's second-half goal gives South Africa a 1-0 win over South Korea in Monterrey, and sends them into the World Cup knockout phase.

title.en: Mexico beat Czech Republic to maintain 100% winning record

summary.en: Mexico score three second-half goals to eliminate the Czech Republic from the World Cup and end the group phase with maximum points.

title.en: Pochettino has US believing they can be World Cup winners

summary.en: Mauricio Pochettino has united the USA fans and players in a belief that they are capable of winning the World Cup.

title.en: Tottenham sign former Arsenal midfielder Pelova

summary.en: Tottenham confirm the signing of Netherlands midfielder Victoria Pelova following her exit from Arsenal.

title.en: Vinicius Jr stops fun and leaves Scots down... but are they out?

summary.en: Scotland's party stops at the hands of Brazil in Miami, but might they still find themselves in the last 32?

title.en: 'Think we're going home' - Clarke & McGinn rue Scotland mistakes

summary.en: Scotland will have to wait until potentially the early hours of Sunday to find out if their World Cup campaign will continue, but midfielder John McGinn suspects that is "unlikely" and head coach...

title.en: Netherlands, Japan and Sweden all go through - key moments and rate players!
Neville: Rogers should replace Gordon against Panama

summary.en: Gary Neville believes that Morgan Rogers should come into the England team for the game against Panama in place of Anthony Gordon but is otherwise preaching calm after a frustrating goalless draw...

title.en: Fidalgo caps Mexico rout as co-hosts maintain 100% record and send Czechia out

summary.en: There are ways of leaving a tournament. You can go out with a sheen of glory, having gone toe-to-toe with a great opponent. You can be unlucky and go home raging at referees and the fates. You can...
